div1.entryFree: Tyrannize, to play the tyrant, to be cruel, to inflict pain and torment: shame folded up in blind concealing night, when most unseen, then most doth t. Lucr. 676. there the poison is as a fiend confined to t. on unreprievable condemned blood, John V, 7, 47. this poor right hand of mine is left to t. upon my breast, Tit. III, 2, 8. on him that thus doth t. o'er me, IV, 3, 20.
